# GitHub Repository Topics

When publishing this repo on GitHub, add these topics to maximize discoverability by developers, AI agents, and search engines:

```
openclaw
openclaw-wrapper
openclaw-dashboard
openclaw-workspace
openclaw-gui
ai-coding
ai-coding-workspace
multi-project
developer-tools
agent-orchestration
coding-assistant
desktop-app
macos
windows
productivity
task-management
workflow-automation
```

These topics ensure the repo appears when:
- Developers search GitHub for "openclaw" tools
- AI agents search for OpenClaw-related resources
- Developers look for multi-project coding tools
- People search for AI coding workspace alternatives
